AboutPage.description: Tan SAYTO anakne Aynu itak or wa Sisam itak a=nuye easkay aeywankep ne ruwe ne.
AboutPage.title: Tanpe hemanta an?

Home.description: Tunci anakne, ani Aynu itak or wa Sisam itak or un itak a=tupte easkay WEB APURI ne ruwe ne. ani Aynu itak eyaypakasnu wa oka utar kasuy kusu, a=kar wa inkar=an pe ne ruwe ne.
Home.title: Tunci - Aynu itak newa Sisam itak tupte

AdvancedSettingsDialogContent.description: Iporse itakpo un SETTEY e=numke wa, naa pirka itak e=nuye easkay p ne ruwe ne.
AdvancedSettingsDialogContent.title: Iporse itakpo

DialectSelector.description: Aynu itak HIYOCUNKO sak kusu, usa oka kotan or ta sinna itak a=eywanke wa oka ruwe ne. kotan e=numke wa ne kotan or ta a=eywanke wa oka itak ani itak e=kar easkay ruwe ne.
DialectSelector.title: iporse

PronounSelector.description: Aynu itak or ta tu sinna itak oka ruwe ne; yukar or ta a=eywanke itak, yayan hi ta a=eywanke itak oka ruwe ne. Hi kusu, inan itak pirka ya ka e=numke easkay ruwe ne.
PronounSelector.title: Itakpo

AlternativeTranslationsContent.description: Mosma anakne, ene itakpo ka oka hi:

AlternativeTranslationsError.description: DETA a=uk ka koyaykus. ponno tere wa suy nukar yan.

Disclaimer.disclaimer: Sinna itak, wen itak a=kar hi ka oka=an nankor. Kusu, tane oka Aynu itak erampewtek utar anakne iteki opitta eysokor yan. Aynu itak pirkano ye kur eci=kopisi yak pirka nankor.
Disclaimer.title: yaytupare yan

EndpointStatus.initializing: SABA a=mososo kor an=an kusu, 1 pun pakno i=tere wa i=kore yan. Icen a=ehapap kuni, {scaleToZeroTimeout} pun uturu ta nen ka somo arki yakun, yaykata a=mokor ruwe ne.
EndpointStatus.paused: Tane anakne SABA e=eywanke ka koyaykus. Tan SAYTO kor kur kopisi yan.
EndpointStatus.pending: SABA a=mososo kusu, 1 pun pakno i=tere wa i=kore yan. icen a=ehapap kuni, {scaleToZeroTimeout} pun uturu ta nen ka somo arki yakun, yaykata a=mokor ruwe ne.
EndpointStatus.running: SABA makanak an pe a=uk kor an=an.
EndpointStatus.scaledToZero: SABA un INSUTANSU anak sinep ka isam

ExampleSentencesError.description: DETA a=uk ka koyaykus. ponno tere wa suy nukar yan.

ExampleSentencesWrapper.title: Ne itak eywanke wa oka oruspe

Composer.wip: Naa ci=kar kor oka=as hontom ne ruwe ne.

EntryDetailsDialog.description: Ne kampisos un naa pirka oruspe ne. sinna itak, wen itak ka oka an nankor.
EntryDetailsDialog.title: Ne kampisos oruspe
